case_number: civil constitutional jurisdiction impugning a notice
sections_cited: Section 56 of the Specific Relief Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1778 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.8000/2019 2. For hearing of main case 25.2.2025 Mr. Muhammad Faran advocate for the petitioners Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General This petition filed in the civil constitutional jurisdiction impugning a notice issued by the Anti-corruption Establishment. This matter has been pending for almost six years and criminal proceedings have been held to a standstill as a consequence hereof. Prima facie, the plea for interference in criminal matters runs contrary to the law as enunciated in Section 56 of the Specific Relief Act. Through this petition, the petitioners have not only sought to interfere in a criminal process, but have also sought a restraint upon the duties of public functionaries. Petition is found to be prima facie frivolous, misconceived and abuse of process of law, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Zahid/*
